active_ingredients: Active ingredient................. Purpose Propylhexedrine 175 mg......Nasal decongestant
indications_and_usage: Uses For the temporarily relief of nasal congestion due to a cold, hay fever, or other upper respiratory allergies (allergic rhinitis).
dosage_and_administration: Directions adults and children 6 to 12 years of age (with adult supervision): two inhalations in each nostril not more than every two hours. children under 6 years of age: consult a doctor
